items.name: Aalu Nimki
items.description: Fried triangular pastry tossed with onion, tomato, potato, chickpeas, coriander, bhujiya and peanuts in Kutumba spice, lemon and signature sauce. (Mild / Medium / Spicy)

items.name: Chatpatey
items.description: Puffed rice with onion, tomato, chickpeas, potato, cucumber, coriander, bhujiya, fried dhungri and peanuts, tossed in Kutumba spice, lemon and mustard oil.

items.name: Samosa Chaat
items.description: Mashed samosa with chickpeas and peanuts, chickpea-potato curry, yoghurt, chaat masala, Kashmiri chilli, pomegranate and fried peanuts.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Puffed shells stuffed with spiced potato, onion, coriander and green chilli, served with tangy water of Kutumba sauce, tamarind, lemon and spices.

items.name: Pakoda (5 pcs)
items.description: Cabbage, onion, coriander and shallot fritters in chickpea-flour batter, served with Kutumba special chutney.

items.name: Aaluchop (3 pcs)
items.description: Potato, onion, coriander and shallot fritters in chickpea-flour batter with Kutumba spice, served with house chutney.

items.name: Dry Laphing
items.description: Flour sheet topped with signature sauce, garlic water, soy, chopped gluten, peanuts and Wai Wai noodles — rolled, sliced and garnished with shallots and sesame.

items.name: Jhol Laphing
items.description: Our dry laphing served with a tangy, spicy dipping broth on the side.

items.name: Spicy Chicken Wings (6 pcs)
items.description: Chicken wings marinated overnight, deep-fried until crispy and coated with our special spices.

items.name: Chilly
items.description: Deep-fried marinated protein sautéed with onion, capsicum, shallots, garlic and coriander in our signature sweet-spicy-tangy sauce.

items.name: Peanut Sadheko
items.description: Peanuts tossed with onion, tomato, coriander, shallots, Kutumba spice, mustard oil and lemon.

items.name: Plain Sausage (1 pc)
items.description: Chicken sausage fried in the deep fryer, served with special sauce.

items.name: Piro Sausage (1 pc)
items.description: Chicken sausage deep-fried with Kutumba spice, served with sauce.

items.name: Chicken Syabhale (2 pcs)
items.description: Traditional Newari stuffed bread, deep-fried until golden.

items.name: Bhutan Set
items.description: Stir-fried goat tripe and assorted cuts with shallots, coriander, onion, garlic and Kutumba spice — served with taichin chiura, green salad and black soybean achaar.

items.name: Sekuwa Set
items.description: Char-grilled marinated sekuwa with masala puffed rice, green salad and Kutumba special sekuwa sauce.

items.name: Taas Set
items.description: Spicy fried goat meat served with masala puffed rice (with onion, coriander, mustard oil), green salad and radish pickle.

items.name: Choila Set
items.description: Spicy marinated chicken / buff / goat, deep-fried and tossed with onion, ginger, coriander, shallots and Kutumba spice — served with chiura, salad and potato achaar.

items.name: Nepalese Curry
items.description: Home-style Nepalese curry slow-cooked in traditional spices.

items.name: Matar Paneer Curry
items.description: Cottage cheese and green peas in a rich tomato-onion gravy.

items.name: Aalu Tama Bodi Curry
items.description: Classic Nepali curry of potato, bamboo shoot and black-eyed beans.

items.name: Cauli Aalu Curry
items.description: Cauliflower and potato cooked Nepali-style.

items.name: Fish Curry
items.description: Fish simmered in a fragrant Nepalese curry.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.description: Basmati rice tempered with cumin.

items.name: Plain Rice
items.description: Steamed basmati rice.

items.name: Fruits and Nuts Pulao
items.description: Fragrant pulao with seasonal fruits and nuts.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Wok-fried rice with egg and vegetables.

items.name: Steam Momo
items.description: Steamed dumplings, the Kathmandu classic.

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Momo pan-fried until golden and crisp.

items.name: Kothe Momo
items.description: Momo half-steamed and half-fried — crisp bottoms, tender tops.

items.name: Chilly Momo
items.description: Crispy momo tossed in our house chilli sauce.

items.name: Sadeheko Momo
items.description: Momo tossed sadheko-style with onion, coriander and Kutumba spices.

items.name: Momo Platter (20 pcs)
items.description: Twenty pieces of momo — perfect to share.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Pan-fried stick noodles with vegetables and Nepalese spices.

items.name: Keema Noodles (Hot & Spicy)
items.description: Indo-Nepali fusion — boiled noodles served over spiced chicken keema with garlic, ginger, onion, coriander, chilli and soy, topped with bok-choy.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Boiled stick noodles in authentic soup.

items.name: Thakali Set
items.description: Rice, choice of curry, daal, achaar, spinach, Nepalese-style curry, salad, papad and gulab jamun with yoghurt.

items.name: Daal
items.description: Extra serve of Nepalese-style lentil daal.

items.name: Chicken Curry (add-on)
items.description: Extra serve of chicken curry.

items.name: Goat Curry (add-on)
items.description: Extra serve of goat curry.

items.name: Veg Curry (add-on)
items.description: Extra serve of vegetable curry.

items.name: Gundruk Achar
items.description: Traditional fermented leafy-green pickle.

items.name: Tomato Chutney
items.description: House tomato chutney.

items.name: Mula Achar
items.description: Tangy radish pickle.

items.name: Extra Dessert
items.description: Add a serve of our seasonal dessert.

items.name: Saag
items.description: Sautéed seasonal greens.

items.name: Khasi Ko Khutti Soup with Momo
items.description: Nepali goat-leg soup pressure-cooked in aromatic spices with onion, ginger, garlic, tomato and shallots — served with your choice of chicken, veg or buff momo.

items.name: Kutumba Mix Platter
items.description: Pakauda, chilly momo, sadheko momo, spicy chicken wings, veg chowmein and aalu achar — the best of Kutumba on one plate.

items.name: Chips & Nuggets
items.description: Chips and chicken nuggets — the family-friendly favourite.

items.name: Chips
items.description: Hot, golden chips.

items.name: Nuggets
items.description: Crispy chicken nuggets.
